data.title: Add RED structural tests for ADR always-generated behavior to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
data.description:
Add 4 new structural-boundary test functions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh. All patterns verified against current SKILL.md.

Tests to add (RED against current SKILL.md):
- test_adrs_always_generated: greps 'always generate.*adr' (absent from current SKILL.md)
- test_adr_session_scope: greps 'generat.*adr.*session' (absent from current SKILL.md)
- test_adr_dedup_logic: greps 'dedup|deduplication' (absent from current SKILL.md)
- test_no_adr_preference_question: expects 'ADR preference' NOT present (currently IS on line 95 → RED)

Insertion: after test_diff_existing_files call (line 291), before print_summary (line 293).

Header update: run 'grep -c "^test_.*().*{" tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh' to get live count, then update header to (live_count+4). Append 4 new test names to header listing.

Append 4 RED markers to .test-index (standalone lines, do NOT modify existing coverage-map entries on lines 63/65):
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adrs_always_generated]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adr_session_scope]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adr_dedup_logic]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_no_adr_preference_question]

testing_mode: UPDATE
Files: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh, .test-index
